## Summary

Describe the feature idea in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What limitation or pain point does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed behavior, command, or output format.

## Use Case

How would this be used in real workflows?

## Example (optional)

Add example command(s), expected output, or pseudo-flow.

```bash
# example command
```

```text
# expected output
```

## Alternatives Considered

List alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Any references, related issues, or implementation notes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before opening this request
- [ ] I described the problem and why this feature is useful
- [ ] I provided enough detail for implementation discussion
